description: Composition White V-neck printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, sleeveless, has a small collar, 3 buttoned placket with sequin decoration, side vents and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which, along with the sleeveless shape, will keep you cool in warm weather. Wear this over leggings or over jeans depending on the occasion and wear colourful jewellery to match the multicoloured sequins. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
